tools.name: calculate_turnover_cost
tools.title: Calculate dealership turnover cost
tools.description: Estimate the annual cost of employee turnover at a dealership using the same math as the WerkandMe ROI calculator. Provide team size, average salary, and either annual turnover rate (%) or monthly hires; optionally override replacement cost per employee.

employees.description: Total team members at the dealership.

turnoverRate.description: Annual turnover rate as a percent (e.g. 45 for 45%). Provide this OR monthlyHires.

monthlyHires.description: Number of hires per month. Provide this OR turnoverRate.

customReplacementCost.description: Optional: your actual cost to hire + train + ramp one employee (USD). Defaults to 25% of avgSalary.

improvementRate.description: Optional: expected % reduction in turnover from WerkandMe (default 30).

tools.name: get_pitch_summary
tools.title: Get WerkandMe pitch summary
tools.description: Return a concise summary of the WerkandMe pitch: problem, platform features, Culture Coach, and links to the full deck and ROI calculator. Use this to brief a user on what WerkandMe does.
